column1: Bobby Witt Jr. stands out as a top pick to record a hit, riding a strong recent stretch and benefiting from a favorable platoon matchup against Foster Griffin. Ernie Clement offers similar reliability near the top of the order, also facing a soft lefty and playing in a hitter-friendly park. Drake Baldwin and Otto Lopez bring steady profiles with high rates of games with a hit, but Witt’s combination of consistency and matchup edges makes him the most dependable option today.
